 {"id":"bd-ndmq","title":"io_internal_abi calls libc::tmpfile and libc::fclose directly, violating replacement guard","description":"The `emit_foreign_adoption_via_host_tmpfile` helper in `io_internal_abi.rs` calls `libc::tmpfile()` and `libc::fclose()` directly. This violates the standalone/replacement mode constraints and causes the `check_replacement_guard.sh replacement` check to fail, breaking the build. The test helper should use the native equivalents or be whitelisted.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-18T19:12:28.468962613Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-19T20:34:06.561311256Z","closed_at":"2026-04-19T20:34:06.559034152Z","close_reason":"No repro; io_internal_abi helper already uses stdio_abi tmpfile/fclose and replacement guard passes","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

-{"id":"bd-ni101","title":"iconv ABI: stack overflow on invalid UTF-8 under mode=hardened","description":"## Symptom

`cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi --test iconv_abi_test hardened_mode_iconv_invalid_utf8_reports_eilseq` aborts with:

```
thread 'hardened_mode_iconv_invalid_utf8_reports_eilseq' (...) has overflowed its stack
fatal runtime error: stack overflow, aborting
...(signal: 6, SIGABRT)
```

Reproduces reliably on Linux x86_64 with the current tree (commit a47dd54e, 2026-04-22). Blocks `cargo test --workspace` from completing cleanly (noted in UPGRADE_LOG.md 2026-04-22).

## Test

`crates/frankenlibc-abi/tests/iconv_abi_test.rs:822` `hardened_mode_iconv_invalid_utf8_reports_eilseq`

The test wraps a standard iconv call in `with_mode("hardened", ...)` which sets `FRANKENLIBC_MODE=hardened` via env var, then feeds invalid UTF-8 (`[0xC3, 0x28]`) through UTF-8 -> UTF-16LE and expects `ICONV_ERROR` + `errno == EILSEQ`. The strict-mode counterpart (line ~805) passes fine.

## Likely site

The core iconv path (`crates/frankenlibc-core/src/iconv/mod.rs`) has no mode-specific branching — it just decodes and emits EILSEQ cleanly. So the recursion must originate in the ABI layer's `runtime_policy::decide` or one of its downstream kernel hooks for `ApiFamily::Locale` + `SafetyLevel::Hardened`. `decide` wraps the kernel call in `panic::catch_unwind` but stack overflow isn't a panic, so the unwind guard doesn't catch it.

## Fix direction

1. Run with `RUST_BACKTRACE=1` under `ulimit -s unlimited` to get a deep backtrace and confirm the recursion site.
2. Audit any re-entrant calls in the Locale-family hardened path of the membrane kernel (runtime_math::* observers, scaled_cost, observe -> decide loop, etc.).
3. Likely candidates: an observer re-triggers decide, or a hardened-mode callback re-enters via `set_abi_errno` -> locale lookup -> iconv ABI -> decide.

## Out of scope

Not a dep-update regression (pins are at latest stable; same failure was noted by the cod session on 2026-04-22 before any of cc-libc's commits).

## Provenance

First documented in UPGRADE_LOG.md 2026-04-22 exhaustive-refresh session. Not previously tracked as a bead.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-22T10:48:49.728849045Z","created_by":"cc-libc","updated_at":"2026-04-22T10:53:02.549461014Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["abi","hardened","iconv","membrane","stack-overflow","testing"]}

 {"id":"bd-nklt","title":"D.2: (SUPERSEDED) — folded into parent bd-9dq5","description":"## Goal
Implement gai_suspend() which waits for one or more async DNS requests to complete, with optional timeout.

## POSIX Signature
```c
int gai_suspend(const struct gaicb *const list[], int nitems, const struct timespec *timeout);
```

Returns:
- 0: at least one request completed
- EAI_AGAIN: timeout expired before any completion
- EAI_ALLDONE: all requests already completed
- EAI_SYSTEM: error (errno set)

## Design
1. Scan the request list — if any are already completed (gai_error != EAI_INPROGRESS), return 0 immediately
2. If all are completed, return EAI_ALLDONE
3. Otherwise, wait using a futex on a shared completion counter:
   - Each request increments a completion futex when it transitions out of IN_PROGRESS
   - gai_suspend does FUTEX_WAIT on the counter with timeout
   - On wake, re-scan the list for completed requests
4. If timeout is NULL, wait indefinitely (block until at least one completes)
5. If timeout expires, return EAI_AGAIN

## Implementation
File: crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/unistd_abi.rs
- Replace gai_suspend body
- Add ASYNC_DNS_COMPLETION_FUTEX: AtomicU32 (incremented on each completion)
- Use SYS_futex for timed wait

## Testing
- All requests already done: returns EAI_ALLDONE
- Empty list (nitems=0): returns EAI_ALLDONE
- Null list: returns EAI_SYSTEM with EINVAL
- Timeout with no completions: returns EAI_AGAIN (use short 1ms timeout)
- One request completes immediately: returns 0

## Acceptance Criteria
gai_suspend correctly waits and returns appropriate status codes. Timeout is respected. Tests pass.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:19:58.266246587Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-03T02:04:22.166397683Z","closed_at":"2026-04-03T01:59:38.578636240Z","close_reason":"Superseded: Track D redesigned as synchronous-only. No gai_suspend futex wait needed — function returns immediately since no async requests exist.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["async","resolv","stub-elimination"]}
 {"id":"bd-nqoa","title":"Metamorphic proptests for pthread condvar contract state machine","description":"cond.rs currently has unit tests covering individual contract transitions but no property-based metamorphic tests. Add MRs analogous to bd-73gu's mutex coverage: (1) Signal/Broadcast never block, (2) Wait/TimedWait always block, (3) Destroyed absorbing state, (4) Uninitialized absorbing state, (5) Broadcast drains Waiting→Idle regardless of has_waiters, (6) blocks⇒errno==0 structural invariant. Scope: crates/frankenlibc-core/src/pthread/cond.rs #[cfg(test)] module. One MR per commit, mutation-validated.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-20T18:43:10.806078382Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-20T18:48:51.832482968Z","closed_at":"2026-04-20T18:48:51.830344062Z","close_reason":"Added 8 metamorphic proptests on condvar_contract_transition across 4 commits: (1) 824c5a2 signal/broadcast never block, (2) 644adfb wait blocks in active states + fast-fails in inactive, (3) 67a9b17 broadcast drains Waiting + signal population-aware, (4) 712bbca Destroyed/Uninitialized absorbing + blocks⇒success. 76 cond tests pass (up from 68). Parity with mutex contract MR suite (bd-73gu).","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
